details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.

reports/board/ directory missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md, systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README and specs. reports/audit/ exists.

Deprecated directories found: moltbot/ (contains sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py), board/ (contains eod/ subdirectory with historical outputs). These should have been removed per prior governance audits.

Moltbot references found in active code/config: moltbot/ directory (5 Python files), scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. Clawdbot/Moltbot references in reports/audit and docs (documenting removal) were excluded per policy.
